name: Taq DNA Polymerase
striking_fact: Stays liquid at −20°C because it’s in 50% glycerol — take it out, use it, return it immediately.

sds_facts.storage: Store at −20°C. Do not store in frost-free freezer (temperature cycling degrades activity).

bench_knowledge: 50% glycerol depresses the freezing point below −20°C; the enzyme is liquid in the freezer. Do not let it sit at room temperature or it will denature.
Reverse pipette: aspirate beyond the desired volume, then dispense to the first stop only. This prevents air bubbles in viscous glycerol stocks.
Never vortex — shear force denatures the polymerase. Mix by gentle flicking or inversion.
Keep on ice the entire time the tube is out of the freezer; return within 30 minutes.
